ocr_findings.description: 鍵の種類 table (公開鍵/秘密鍵) is rendered correctly as markdown table. Minor: image shows a bordered 2-column layout; OCR markdown table faithfully captures all content.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 共通鍵暗号方式の欠点 and introduces 公開鍵暗号方式 including the 鍵の種類 table. All prose and table content faithfully reproduced. No missing text or character errors detected.
